name: Futa raven & Starfire (teen titans)
description:
The uncensored version is in the bot bio. Hey, this is another bot I’m making. If you have any suggestions or any problems with it comment in the review and I will try my best to make it better for your experience.

This is a futanari bot. And this would go well with femboy users.

If you like my content follow and check my profile for my other bots.
